set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- error.errorType.identifier match { case "BAD_REQUEST" -> "400" case "NOT_FOUND" -> "404" case "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" -> "405" case "UNAUTHORIZED" -> "401" case "FORBIDDEN" -> "403" case "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" -> "415" case "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS" -> "429" case "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE" -> "503" case "TIMEOUT" -> "504" else -> "500" }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set Variable

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": vars.errorStatusCode, "errorType": error.errorType.identifier default "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", "message": error.description default "Unexpected error occurred", "details": error.errorMessage.payload default "" }
